author: y4rr
content: Phase 7 plan loaded: SE primitive (Movement 1) → MobileNetV2 (Movement 2, all-Conv2d expand+depthwise+project + BN, ReLU6) → MobileNetV3-Small (Movement 3, V3 conf table, SE+HardSigmoid scale) → EfficientNet-B0 (Movement 4, MBConv+SE+SiLU+Sigmoid scale, stochastic depth = identity in eval). Probe-before-fix: dump named_parameters() against torchvision sorted set per model; STOP-AND-REPORT on unexpected divergence. Existing 8 PASSes (resnet18/34/50, vgg11/16, densenet121, fcn_resnet50, vit_b_16) preserved.
